  validate-json              Validates that the json is valid and any 
                             referenced secrets exist

  clear-library              Removes ALL the variables in the specified library
                             variable set

  upload-library             Removes ALL the variables in the specified library
                             variable set

  validate-tenant            Validates that the json is valid and any 
                             referenced secrets, environments, or projects, 
                             exist

  upload-project             Convert json file to environment variables and 
                             upload them to Octopus

  upload-project-template    Upload them to an Octopus project as templates

  clear-project              Removes ALL the variable templates in the 
                             specified project

  clear-tenant               Removes ALL the variables in the specified tenant

  help                       Display more information on a specific command.

  version                    Display version information.

commands.payload:
OctoConfigTool 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 Alex Fuerst

  validate-json              Validates that the json is valid and any 
                             referenced secrets exist

  clear-library              Removes ALL the variables in the specified library
                             variable set

  upload-library             Removes ALL the variables in the specified library
                             variable set

  validate-tenant            Validates that the json is valid and any 
                             referenced secrets, environments, or projects, 
                             exist

  upload-project             Convert json file to environment variables and 
                             upload them to Octopus

  upload-project-template    Upload them to an Octopus project as templates

  clear-project              Removes ALL the variable templates in the 
                             specified project

  clear-tenant               Removes ALL the variables in the specified tenant

  help                       Display more information on a specific command.

  version                    Display version information.

result.stderr:
OctoConfigTool 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 Alex Fuerst

  -l, --library         Required. The Octopus Library to upload variables to

  -r, --roles           The Octopus role(s) to scope variables to

  -f, --file            Required. The json file to parse into variables

  -e, --environments    The Octopus Environment to scope variables to

  --vaultUri            The Vault API URI

  --vaultRole           The Role ID the app will run as

  --secret              The Vault Secret ID associated with the Vault Role

  --mountPoint          (Default: ) The base mount point for the Vault secrets 
                        engine

  --variableType        Required. The type of Octopus variables to convert the 
                        json file into

  -p, --prefix          (Default: ) A Prefix to prepend to variables

  -a, --apikey          Required. The Octopus API key to use

  -o, --octotUri        Required. The Octopus API URI

  -v, --verbose         (Default: false) Max verbosity

  -m, --merge           (Default: false) Forces json arrays to be merged into 
                        one variable, rather than generated with idicies

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.
